headline: Hue's wired wall modules bring non-smart lights into its ecosystem
summary: Philips Hue introduces its first wired wall modules. These devices integrate non-smart lights into the Hue ecosystem. New Play lamps and E14 upgrades were also announced.

headline: The NTS Radio Player brings internet radio to your hi-fi
summary: NTS Radio and Atonemo launched a dedicated player for NTS mixes and streams. The device connects to almost any stereo or speaker setup. It also supports major streaming services via AirPlay 2, Google Cast, Spotify, and Tidal Connect.

headline: Amazon MGM drops Sam Altman film 'Artificial'
summary: Luca Guadagnino's film "Artificial," about OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, has been dropped by Amazon MGM. The movie starred Andrew Garfield and covered Altman's 2023 termination and reinstatement. It had been in development for about a year.

headline: Our long national sunscreen nightmare is almost over
summary: This article is from "Optimizer," a newsletter discussing new tech and products. It highlights a trend on TikTok where some youths are against wearing sunscreen. The piece likely discusses advancements or changes in sunscreen regulations or efficacy.

headline: Amazon Audible deal offers $1/month plus $20 credit
summary: Amazon's June Audible deal has improved ahead of Prime Day. New subscribers can pay just $1 per month for a limited time. The offer also includes a $20 Audible credit.

headline: Doom Composer Bobby Prince Dies at 81
summary: Robert Caskin 'Bobby' Prince III, renowned video game composer, has passed away. He was 81 years old. Prince was known for his work on classic '90s titles like Doom and Duke Nukem 3D.

headline: Charizard voted favorite Pokémon in Target collection
summary: Fans have voted Charizard as their top choice in the Pokémon x Target Collection. The article likely covers a recent poll or fan engagement event. Charizard continues its popularity streak among Pokémon fans.

headline: Toy Story 5 has strongest preview opening of 2026
summary: "Toy Story 5" achieved the strongest preview opening of 2026 to date. The film is poised for major success for Pixar and Disney. Its lucrative preview period indicates a strong box office performance.

headline: What does Keir Starmer do after Makerfield win?
summary: Discussion intensifies around Keir Starmer's future after Andy Burnham's Makerfield by-election victory. The win by a prominent Labour figure prompts questions about party leadership's next steps. The by-election result has significant implications for national politics.

headline: 3-year-old boy attacked by crocodile at zoo
summary: A 3-year-old boy was injured at a zoo after being attacked by a crocodile. Police arrested a man on suspicion of attempted murder in connection with the incident. The arrested individual has since been bailed.

headline: Meloni denies Trump's photo story: 'Neither I nor Italy ever beg'
summary: Italian PM Giorgia Meloni refuted Donald Trump's story about a photo, stating Italy doesn't beg. The public exchange signals a strain in their previously close relationship. This comes after Trump's decision regarding Iran.

headline: Historic by-election win for Scottish Conservatives, says Badenoch
summary: Kemi Badenoch celebrated the Scottish Conservatives' first by-election win since 1973. The party secured the Aberdeen South seat from the SNP. This victory sends a clear message to both Labour and the SNP.
